title: Revamped Foods
description: Adds new vanilla like textures and animations for food items
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a4f694b740b2671f47ad9464db0cedcbde3c377.gif)




<details>
<summary>About</summary>

Revamped Foods is a vanilla like recourse pack ment to refresh the food items in minecraft it adds new textures and animations to foods in the game.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Comparison</summary>

| Pack textures             | Vanilla textures               |
|---------------------|:---------------------:|
| ![Pack textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bd35d33cebd98222f7813765103d3ec2c735bb3.png)            | ![vanilla textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e17536fde594b997425cf9dff0fcb8b113acc4fd.png)              |

</details>


<details>
<summary>Important</summary>
  
You may not resell or reupload this pack!
  
It is fine to use in your modrinth modpacks aslong as it is credited.

</details>
